title: perezia multiflora subsp. sonchifolia
intro: Perezia multiflora subsp. sonchifolia, also known as Sonchifolia, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Andean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Sonchifolia include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves are often dried for later use in herbal remedies.
